hero.description: EntrenaTu is the ultimate platform to manage your routines, monitor your progress, and push your limits every day.

routines.title: Custom Routines
routines.desc: Create and manage your own workout plans or choose from our predefined templates.

tracking.title: Detailed Tracking
tracking.desc: Visualize your progress with intuitive charts for weight, reps, and total volume.

history.title: Complete History
history.desc: Access every past session to analyze your performance and beat your personal records.

home.title: Your Dashboard
home.subtitle: Select one of your routines and start training.
home.empty: You haven't created any routines yet.
home.emptyHint: Go to the "Routines" section to build your first workout plan.
home.alertSuccess: Great job! You have completed the routine: {{name}} 💪
home.alertError: There was an error logging the workout.
home.alertLogin: You must be logged in to log a workout.

routines.title: Planning
routines.subtitle: Create base exercises and link them to form your routines.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Check your past workouts and analyze your performance.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account and personalize your experience.
